# Security Policy

This repository follows a strict security policy to ensure the safety and integrity of its codebase.

## Reporting Vulnerabilities

Any security vulnerabilities should be reported to the project maintainers via the official issue tracker at https://github.com/fcano/taskodrill/issues.

## Response Time

All reported vulnerabilities will be acknowledged within 24 hours. A response will be provided within 48 hours, and a fix will be deployed within 7 days.

## Code Review

All pull requests must undergo a code review process with at least one approved review before merging.

## Dependency Management

Dependencies are pinned to specific versions using hashes to prevent unexpected updates.

## Token Permissions

All GitHub workflow tokens are restricted to minimal required permissions.
